entries.summary: Initial brain save. Phase 01 + 02 committed. Phase 03 code complete but uncommitted.
project_changes: Phase 01: NestJS project init, Prisma, Supabase config (750efb7)
Phase 02: Database schema (11 tables), Supabase JWT auth (b96af61)
Phase 03: Tenant + Agent CRUD with RBAC (uncommitted)

commits.message: chore: init monorepo - AI Automation Suite
feat(be): Phase 02 - Database schema, Prisma, Auth module

working_tree.summary: Phase 03 fully implemented. 14 new files, 13 modified.

decisions: Use sellerId (not authId/sub) as identity key for service queries
AuthenticatedUser.sellerId is required (Strategy always auto-creates Seller)
Controllers use inline type { sellerId: string } (TS isolatedModules constraint)
TenantGuard attaches tenant + membership to request
Nested REST routes: /tenants/:tenantId/agents

entries.summary: Phase 03 committed. Working tree clean. Brain files included in commit for cross-machine portability.
project_changes: Phase 03 committed: Tenant + Agent CRUD, RBAC, DTOs, Guards (421a13d)
Project knowledge base doc created in docs/
Brain files (.brain/) added to repo for portability

commits.message: feat(be): Phase 03 - Tenant & Agent CRUD with RBAC

decisions: Brain files committed to Git for cross-machine usage
Branch renamed from master to main
open_questions: Tenant.settings DTO - add in Phase 10 or earlier?
HNSW index needs manual SQL (Prisma db push does not support)

entries.summary: Phase 04 LLM Integration complete. Gemini 2.5 Flash connected via OpenAI-compatible API. ConversationModule with chat endpoint, conversation list, message history. TSC 0, ESLint 0.
project_changes: Switched AI provider from OpenAI placeholder to Gemini 2.5 Flash (free tier)
Created LlmModule + LlmService (OpenAI SDK → Gemini endpoint)
Created ConversationModule: POST /chat, GET /conversations, GET /conversations/:id/messages
Chat flow: resolve customer → resolve conversation → save user msg → build context (persona+history) → call Gemini → save reply + token tracking
Logic fixes: history desc+reverse, HUMAN_AGENT→assistant, LLM error handling with try/catch+Logger

commits.message: feat(be): Phase 04 - LLM Integration (Gemini 2.5 Flash + ConversationModule)

working_tree.summary: 14 files changed (8 new, 6 modified), 481 insertions. All committed.

decisions: Gemini 2.5 Flash chosen over OpenAI: free tier, OpenAI-compat API, quality ngang GPT-4o
Reuse OpenAI SDK (npm openai) with Gemini base URL — easy provider switch later
OPENAI_API_KEY env var stores Gemini key (backward compatible naming)
LlmService is @Global via CommonModule — any module can inject
Customer auto-create on chat if no customerId provided
HISTORY_LIMIT = 20 messages (desc+reverse for correct recency)
next_steps: FE Sprint 4: Chat UI (page /dashboard/chat, agent selector, message input, reply display)
E2E test via Chat UI (natural test — login → select agent → chat → verify Gemini reply)
BE Phase 05: Knowledge RAG (upload docs, embedding, retrieval)
open_questions: Gemini API key exposed in chat — need to rotate
Swagger UI not configured (optional but useful for API testing)

entries.summary: Refactored Agent UX: platform controls AI model, user focuses on persona. FE form simplified, Agent card shows persona preview. Schema default updated to gemini-2.5-flash.
project_changes: FE: Removed model/temperature/maxTokens from Agent form and card
FE: Agent card shows persona preview instead of model chips
BE: Prisma Agent default model changed from gpt-4o-mini to gemini-2.5-flash
Business rule: Platform controls model, user only configures name/persona/greeting

commits.message: feat(be): Phase 04 - LLM Integration (Gemini 2.5 Flash + ConversationModule)
refactor: hide LLM params from user, platform controls model

decisions: Platform controls AI model — prevents cost mismatch with message-based billing
Agent form simplified to 3 fields: name, persona, greeting
BE DTO keeps optional model/temp/maxTokens for admin override via API
next_steps: Run SQL migration on existing agents in Supabase Dashboard
open_questions: DB agents still have model='gpt-4o-mini' — need manual SQL update via Supabase

entries.summary: Phase 05-08 complete. Pipeline metrics + quota (05+06), Knowledge Upload (07), RAG Search (08). Chat pipeline now 8 stages with knowledge injection. BE 8/11 phases done.
project_changes: Phase 05+06: Pipeline metrics logging, quota check/increment, resolve endpoint (3560291)
Phase 07: Knowledge Upload — TextExtractor (pdf-parse), TextChunker (recursive), EmbeddingService (Gemini gemini-embedding-001 1536d), pgvector store (b2c1504)
Phase 08: KnowledgeSearchService (cosine similarity, threshold 0.3, top-K=5), RAG prompt injection (soft-lock), graceful fallback (dfe8d15)
Chat pipeline: Context → Quota → Resolve → Save → History → Knowledge Search → LLM → Response
New deps: @google/generative-ai, pdf-parse, @types/multer

commits.message: feat: test chat cost protection
feat: add POST /chat/test endpoint
feat(be): Phase 05+06 complete
feat(be): Phase 07 — Knowledge Upload & Processing pipeline
feat(be): Phase 08 — Knowledge Search & RAG pipeline integration

decisions: Gemini gemini-embedding-001 for embedding (free tier, MRL truncation to 1536d)
Recursive text splitter (1500 chars, 200 overlap) over sentence-based
Soft-lock RAG prompt: prioritize knowledge but allow general answers (ecommerce chatbot needs greetings)
Graceful fallback: knowledge search failure does not break chat
Similarity threshold 0.3 (conservative to avoid discarding marginal matches)
next_steps: Phase 09: Facebook Messenger Channel (webhook, page token, message routing)
FE: Knowledge upload UI, Chat test with uploaded knowledge
open_questions: HNSW index needs manual SQL on Supabase (prisma db push doesn't support)

entries.summary: Phase 09 Facebook Messenger Channel hoàn thành. End-to-end: khách nhắn FB → webhook → AI reply → gửi lại FB. Nhân viên reply qua CMS → gửi FB. Bàn giao lại cho bot hoạt động.
project_changes: Channel module mới (7 files): adapter pattern, webhook, service, controller
Facebook adapter: normalize incoming + sendReply via Graph API (Bearer auth)
Webhook: HMAC-SHA256 + timingSafeEqual verification
Message routing: page_id → tenant → agent → pipeline → reply
sendHumanReplyToChannel: forward human agent messages to FB Messenger
handoverToBot endpoint: OPEN → BOT_HANDLING + SYSTEM audit message
OnModuleDestroy for dedup interval cleanup
Prisma datasource: url = env(DATABASE_URL)

commits.message: feat: Phase 09 — Facebook Channel + security fixes + handover-to-bot
docs: update plans — Phase 09 Facebook Channel done, 9/11 phases complete

decisions: In-memory Map for dedup (MVP) — Redis khi multi-instance
FB access token plain text (MVP) — encrypt AES-256 Phase 10
Fire-and-forget for sendHumanReplyToChannel
SYSTEM message audit trail khi handover to bot
next_steps: Phase 10: Self-serve API & Polish — encrypt tokens, rate limiting
open_questions: Encrypt FB access token khi nào? Phase 10 hay sớm hơn?

entries.summary: Phase 06E — WebSocket real-time CRM complete. ChatGateway with JWT auth + tenant rooms, EventEmitter2 decoupling, CORS env restriction, timestamp consistency.
project_changes: ws-events.ts: typed event constants + payload interfaces (3 events)
ChatGateway: JWT auth on connect, tenant room join, CORS restriction
ConversationService: emit events on resolve, humanReply, handoverToBot
ChannelService: emit events on new message, new conversation, bot reply
EventEmitterModule.forRoot() registered globally in AppModule
conversation.module: register ChatGateway as provider

commits.message: docs(plan): split Phase 06E into 4 sub-phases
feat: Phase 06E — WebSocket real-time CRM (Socket.IO)

decisions: Socket.IO over raw WebSocket — built-in reconnect, rooms, fallback to polling
EventEmitter2 decoupling — avoid circular deps, easy swap to Redis Pub/Sub
Tenant-level rooms (not conversation-level) — correct for CRM agent dashboard
CORS: dev open, production restrict via CORS_ORIGINS env — same as main.ts
open_questions: Token refresh handling cho long-lived socket connections?

entries.summary: Phase 10 — Self-serve API & Polish (4/7 done). API prefix /api/v1, ResponseInterceptor, GlobalExceptionFilter, Swagger UI /api/docs. Onboarding skipped.
project_changes: main.ts: setGlobalPrefix('api/v1') + exclude webhook, global interceptor + filter, Swagger setup (dev only)
GlobalExceptionFilter: unified error format { success: false, error: { statusCode, message, timestamp, path } }
ResponseInterceptor: unified success format { success: true, data }
nest-cli.json: @nestjs/swagger CLI plugin for auto-detect DTO types
common/index.ts: barrel exports for filter + interceptor
decisions: API prefix /api/v1 — standard for REST APIs, easy versioning
Exclude webhook/facebook from prefix — FB calls directly
Swagger dev-only — disable in production for security
Onboarding endpoint SKIPPED — Supabase Auth + Create Tenant flow already exists
Rate limiting + CORS already done from previous phases
open_questions: Enable Swagger in production? (secured with API key)

entries.summary: 🎉 Phase 11 — Testing & Hardening done. All 11 BE phases complete. Security pipes, 5 DB indexes, Dockerfile upgrade, graceful shutdown.
project_changes: PromptInjectionGuardPipe: 12 regex patterns for LLM injection (jailbreak, DAN, ignore instructions)
SanitizeInputPipe: strip HTML/script tags, XSS prevention
Applied pipes to chat + test-chat + human-reply endpoints via @UsePipes
5 DB indexes: conversations, messages, customers, channel_connections, knowledge_chunks (ivfflat)
Dockerfile: non-root user, healthcheck, multi-stage build
main.ts: app.enableShutdownHooks() for graceful shutdown
Cleaned up temp test/verify scripts

commits.message: feat: Phase 11 — security hardening, DB indexes, Dockerfile, graceful shutdown. All 11 phases complete 🎉

decisions: Integration tests SKIPPED — MVP, manual testing sufficient
PromptInjectionGuardPipe as @UsePipes (not global) — only on LLM-facing endpoints
SanitizeInputPipe strips ALL HTML — ecommerce chat doesn't need rich text
IVFFlat over HNSW — better for current dataset size, needs maintenance_work_mem=128MB
DB indexes verified via EXPLAIN ANALYZE — Seq Scan normal for small datasets
next_steps: Zalo OA Channel / Website Widget / Payment Integration

entries.summary: Prisma 7.x adaptation and Deployment ready. Fixed build path and added Render/Vercel guides.
project_changes: Adapted to Prisma 7.x (removed deprecated postgresqlExtensions, fixed Dockerfile)
Fixed dist/main.js path by excluding prisma.config.ts from build
Deployment guide added for Render + Vercel (free tier)
Roadmap post-MVP updated

commits.message: docs: deployment guide (Oracle Cloud + Vercel), docker-compose, nginx, roadmap post-MVP
docs: switch deployment guide to Render + Vercel (free tier)
fix: remove deprecated postgresqlExtensions previewFeature (Prisma 7.x)
fix: adapt to Prisma 7.x breaking changes (remove url from schema, fix Dockerfile)
fix: exclude prisma.config.ts from build (fixes dist/main.js path)
update deploy status

decisions: Prisma 7.x adaptation: removed postgresqlExtensions as it's no longer needed/supported in previewFeature
Exclude prisma.config.ts: build output was putting main.js in a subfolder dist/src/main.js instead of dist/main.js
Render + Vercel: chosen as easiest free tier deployment path for MVP
